title: pyrrosia tonkinensis
intro: Pyrrosia tonkinensis, also known as Tonkin rhinoceros fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The Tonkin rhinoceros fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pyrrosia tonkinensis are often dried and then used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
